_**User (2026-03-03 18:04:24Z)**_

Implement the following plan:

# Toolbar 悬浮态改造

## Context

当前 ToolbarPlugin 作为编辑器 `header` 插槽渲染，全宽 + `borderBottom` 分隔线，视觉上偏"传统编辑器"。用户希望改为悬浮面板风格（类 Notion/macOS），同时支持 sticky 吸顶。

## 方案

仅修改样式层（`styles.css.ts`），不改组件结构。toolbar 仍通过 `header` 插槽传入，DOM 位置不变。

### 修改文件

**`haklex/rich-plugin-toolbar/src/styles.css.ts`**

`toolbarContainer`:
- 移除 `borderBottom`
- 新增：`borderRadius: 12`，`border: 1px solid ${vars.color.border}`
- 新增：`backdropFilter: 'blur(8px)'`，`backgroundColor: color-mix(in srgb, ${vars.color.bg} 90%, transparent)`
- 新增：`boxShadow: vars.boxShadow.topBar`
- 新增：`position: 'sticky'`，`top: 0`，`zIndex: 10`
- 新增：`margin: '12px 16px 0'`（与编辑器边缘留白，使其"浮"起来）
- 新增：`maxWidth: vars.layout.maxWidth`，居中（`margin: '12px auto 0'`，配合 `padding: 0 16px` 的父级）

`toolbarRow`:
- 移除 `maxWidth` 和 `margin: '0 auto'`（容器自身已约束宽度，行无需再限制）

**`haklex/rich-editor/src/components/ContentEditable.tsx`**

- `hasHeader` 时 padding-top 从 48px 调为 16px（浮动 toolbar 自带 margin-top 12px，无需大间距）

### 不变

- `ToolbarPlugin.tsx` 组件逻辑不变
- `ToolbarButton.tsx`、`ToolbarDropdown.tsx` 不变
- `RichEditor.tsx` header 插槽机制不变

## 验证

`pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev` 查看效果：toolbar 应呈圆角卡片状浮于编辑器顶部，滚动时吸顶。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-03 18:07:25Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The issue is that `sticky` positioning requires the parent to have `overflow: visible` (which is the default), but if any ancestor has `overflow: hidden` or `overflow: auto`, sticky won't work relative to the viewport - it'll be relative to that ancestor's scroll container.

Looking at the structure:
- `div.rich-editor` contains `{header}` (the toolbar) and the content area
- The toolbar is rendered as a direct child of `.rich-editor`

The problem is that `.rich-editor` div itself doesn't have `overflow: auto` - the scrolling happens on the page level (probably `body` or some outer container). For sticky to work, the `.rich-editor` container needs to be the scroll container, or the sticky element needs to be within a container that scrolls.


Since scrolling happens at the page level and `.rich-editor` is a normal flow div without overflow set, sticky positioning should work relative to the viewport. But I need to verify there's no ancestor between the header and the scroll container with `overflow: hidden` that would break the sticky behavior.
</details></think>

```text
    29→const emptyColors: ColorSet = { accent: '', text: '', bg: '' }

    31→const colorOverridePresets: ColorPreset[] = [
    32→  { label: 'Default', light: emptyColors, dark: emptyColors },

    43→  {
    44→    label: 'Silver',
    45→    light: { accent: '#737373', text: '#404040', bg: '#ffffff' },
    46→    dark: { accent: '#a3a3a3', text: '#d4d4d4', bg: '#0a0a0a' },
    47→  },
    48→  {
    49→    label: 'Chalk',

    54→
    55→export function EditorPage() {
    56→  const theme = useTheme()
    57→  const [variant, setVariant] = useState<RichEditorVariant>('article')
    58→  const [editorState, setEditorState] = useState<SerializedEditorState | null>(
    59→    null,
    60→  )
    61→  const [showJson, setShowJson] = useState(false)
    62→  const [showRenderer, setShowRenderer] = useState(true)
    63→  const [showImport, setShowImport] = useState(false)
    64→  const [importJson, setImportJson] = useState('')
    65→  const [selectedPreset, setSelectedPreset] = useState('Default')
    66→  const [customAccent, setCustomAccent] = useState('')
    67→  const [enabledPlatforms, setEnabledPlatforms] = useState<Set<string>>(
    68→    new Set(),
    69→  )
    70→
    71→  const activePlatforms = useMemo(
    72→    () => extraMentionPlatforms.filter((p) => enabledPlatforms.has(p.key)),
    73→    [enabledPlatforms],
    74→  )
    75→
    76→  const togglePlatform = useCallback((key: string) => {

    80→      else next.add(key)
    81→      return next
    82→    })
    83→  }, [])
    84→

   138→  return (

   147→              onClick={() => setVariant('article')}
   148→            >
   149→              Article
   150→            </button>
   151→            <button
   152→              className={variant === 'comment' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   153→              onClick={() => setVariant('comment')}
   154→            >
   155→              Comment
   156→            </button>
   157→            <button
   158→              className={variant === 'note' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   159→              onClick={() => setVariant('note')}
   160→            >
   161→              Note
   162→            </button>
   163→          </div>
   164→
   165→          <div className="toolbar-group">
   166→            <span className="toolbar-label">Colors</span>
   167→            {colorOverridePresets.map((preset) => {
   168→              const colors = theme === 'dark' ? preset.dark : preset.light
   169→              return (
   170→                <button
   171→                  key={preset.label}
   172→                  className={
   173→                    !customAccent && selectedPreset === preset.label
   174→                      ? 'btn btn-active'
   175→                      : 'btn'
   176→                  }
   177→                  onClick={() => {
   178→                    setSelectedPreset(preset.label)
   179→                    setCustomAccent('')
   180→                  }}
   181→                >
   182→                  {colors.accent && (
   183→                    <span
   184→                      style={{
   185→                        display: 'inline-block',
   186→                        width: 10,
   187→                        height: 10,
   188→                        borderRadius: '50%',
   189→                        backgroundColor: colors.accent,
   190→                        marginRight: 4,
   191→                        verticalAlign: 'middle',
   192→                      }}
   193→                    />
   194→                  )}
   195→                  {preset.label}
   196→                </button>
   197→              )
   198→            })}
   199→            <label
   200→              className={customAccent ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   201→              style={{ display: 'inline-flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 4 }}
   202→            >
   203→              Custom
   204→              <input
   205→                type="color"
   206→                value={customAccent || '#33a6b8'}
   207→                onChange={(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) =>

   210→                style={{ width: 20, height: 20, border: 'none', padding: 0 }}
   211→              />
   212→            </label>
   213→          </div>
   214→
   215→          <div className="toolbar-group">

   223→                onClick={() => togglePlatform(p.key)}

   228→          </div>
   229→
   230→          <div className="toolbar-group">
   231→            <span className="toolbar-label">View</span>

   234→              onClick={() => setShowRenderer((v) => !v)}

   242→              JSON

   247→            >
   248→              Import
   249→            </button>
   250→          </div>

   252→
   253→        {/* Editor panel */}
   254→        <Panel title="Editor" badge={variant} bodyStyle={{ padding: 0 }}>

   257→            onChange={handleChange}
   258→            variant={variant}
   259→            theme={theme}
   260→            style={themeOverrideStyle}
   261→            placeholder="Start typing... Try markdown shortcuts like # heading, **bold**, *italic*, > quote, ||spoiler||"
   262→            onSubmit={() => console.info('[Submit] Cmd/Ctrl+Enter pressed')}
   263→            header={<ToolbarPlugin />}
   264→            autoFocus
   265→            extraMentionPlatforms={

   267→            }
   268→          />
   269→        </Panel>
   270→
   271→        {/* Renderer panel */}
   272→        {showRenderer && editorState && (
   273→          <Panel title="Renderer (readonly)" badge={variant}>

   289→                className="btn btn-sm"
   290→                onClick={() => {
```

 `./haklex/rich-editor-demo/src/App.tsx`

```text
     1→import 'modern-normalize/modern-normalize.css'
     2→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
     3→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style-renderer.css'
     4→import './demo.css'
     5→
     6→import type { ColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     7→import { DialogStackProvider } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     8→import { Monitor, Moon, Sun } from 'lucide-react'
     9→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
    10→
    11→import { ThemeContext } from './context/ThemeContext'
    12→import { BizPage } from './pages/BizPage'
    13→import { CommentsPage } from './pages/CommentsPage'
    14→import { EditorPage } from './pages/EditorPage'
    15→import { NodeShowcase } from './pages/NodeShowcase'
    16→import { PresetsPage } from './pages/PresetsPage'
    17→
    18→type Page = 'editor' | 'comments' | 'nodes' | 'presets' | 'biz'
    19→type ThemeMode = 'system' | 'light' | 'dark'
    20→
    21→function useSystemColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
    22→  const [scheme, setScheme] = useState<ColorScheme>(() =>
    23→    window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches
    24→      ? 'dark'
    25→      : 'light',
    26→  )
    27→
    28→  useEffect(() => {
    29→    const mq = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
    30→    const handler = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) =>
    31→      setScheme(e.matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
    32→    mq.addEventListener('change', handler)
    33→    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', handler)
    34→  }, [])
    35→
    36→  return scheme
    37→}
    38→
    39→export function App() {
    40→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState<Page>(() => {
    41→    const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    42→    return hash === 'comments' ||
    43→      hash === 'nodes' ||
    44→      hash === 'presets' ||
    45→      hash === 'biz'
    46→      ? hash
    47→      : 'editor'
    48→  })
    49→  const [themeMode, setThemeMode] = useState<ThemeMode>('system')
    50→  const systemScheme = useSystemColorScheme()
    51→
    52→  const resolved: ColorScheme =
    53→    themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode
    54→
    55→  const dataTheme = useMemo(
    56→    () => (themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode),
    57→    [systemScheme, themeMode],
    58→  )
    59→
    60→  const cycleTheme = useCallback(() => {
    61→    setThemeMode((m) => {
    62→      if (m === 'system') return 'light'
    63→      if (m === 'light') return 'dark'
    64→      return 'system'
    65→    })
    66→  }, [])
    67→
    68→  const themeLabel =
    69→    themeMode === 'system' ? 'System' : themeMode === 'light' ? 'Light' : 'Dark'
    70→  const ThemeIcon =
    71→    themeMode === 'system' ? Monitor : themeMode === 'light' ? Sun : Moon
    72→
    73→  useEffect(() => {
    74→    const handleHashChange = () => {
    75→      const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    76→      const validPage =
    77→        hash === 'comments' ||
    78→        hash === 'nodes' ||
    79→        hash === 'presets' ||
    80→        hash === 'biz'
    81→          ? hash
    82→          : 'editor'
    83→      setCurrentPage(validPage)
    84→    }
    85→
    86→    window.addEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    87→    return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    88→  }, [])
    89→
    90→  const navigate = (page: Page) => {
    91→    window.location.hash = page
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  return (
    95→    <ThemeContext value={resolved}>
    96→      <DialogStackProvider>
    97→        <div className="app" data-theme={dataTheme}>
    98→          <header className="app-header">
    99→            <div className="app-header-content">
   100→              <div>
   101→                <h1 className="app-title">@haklex/rich-editor</h1>
   102→                <p className="app-subtitle">
   103→                  Lexical-based rich text editor & renderer
   104→                </p>
   105→              </div>
   106→              <nav className="app-nav">
   107→                <button
   108→                  className={
   109→                    currentPage === 'editor'
   110→                      ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   111→                      : 'nav-tab'
   112→                  }
   113→                  onClick={() => navigate('editor')}
   114→                >
   115→                  Editor
   116→                </button>
   117→                <button
   118→                  className={
   119→                    currentPage === 'comments'
   120→                      ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   121→                      : 'nav-tab'
   122→                  }
   123→                  onClick={() => navigate('comments')}
   124→                >
   125→                  Comments
   126→                </button>
   127→                <button
   128→                  className={
   129→                    currentPage === 'nodes'
   130→                      ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   131→                      : 'nav-tab'
   132→                  }
   133→                  onClick={() => navigate('nodes')}
   134→                >
   135→                  Node Showcase
   136→                </button>
   137→                <button
   138→                  className={
   139→                    currentPage === 'presets'
   140→                      ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   141→                      : 'nav-tab'
   142→                  }
   143→                  onClick={() => navigate('presets')}
   144→                >
   145→                  Presets
   146→                </button>
   147→                <button
   148→                  className={
   149→                    currentPage === 'biz' ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active' : 'nav-tab'
   150→                  }
   151→                  onClick={() => navigate('biz')}
   152→                >
   153→                  Biz
   154→                </button>
   155→                <div className="nav-divider" />
   156→                <button
   157→                  className="nav-theme-toggle"
   158→                  onClick={cycleTheme}
   159→                  title={themeLabel}
   160→                >
   161→                  <ThemeIcon size={18} />
   162→                </button>
   163→              </nav>
   164→            </div>
   165→          </header>
   166→
   167→          <main className="app-main">
   168→            {currentPage === 'editor' && <EditorPage />}
   169→            {currentPage === 'comments' && <CommentsPage />}
   170→            {currentPage === 'nodes' && <NodeShowcase />}
   171→            {currentPage === 'presets' && <PresetsPage />}
   172→            {currentPage === 'biz' && <BizPage />}
   173→          </main>
   174→        </div>
   175→      </DialogStackProvider>
   176→    </ThemeContext>
   177→  )
   178→}
   179→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-03 18:07:59Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Found it. The `.panel` class has `overflow: hidden` which breaks `position: sticky` for child elements. The toolbar is inside `.panel > .panel-body > ShiroEditor > div.rich-editor > {header (ToolbarPlugin)}`.

Since `.panel` has `overflow: hidden`, sticky won't work. The fix should be to remove `overflow: hidden` from `.panel` in the demo CSS.

But wait - the demo is just a demo page. The actual production usage is in the Shiro web app. The sticky behavior should work in production if the parent containers don't have `overflow: hidden`.

The user is pointing out that in the demo page, sticky doesn't work. 

The real issue is that `overflow: hidden` on `.panel` creates a new stacking context and prevents sticky positioning from working on descendants. I could try `overflow: clip` instead, but that also breaks sticky. The problem is that any overflow value besides `visible` on an ancestor will constrain the sticky element. Since the `overflow: hidden` is probably there to clip content at the border-radius, I need to find an alternative approach—maybe applying the overflow constraint only to `.panel-body` instead, or using a different technique altogether. I think the user is actually pointing out this as a problem they want fixed, not just noting it exists. Looking at how the toolbar functions in the production environment, I should address this in the demo by switching `.panel` to use `overflow: clip` instead of `overflow: hidden` — it'll maintain the border-radius clipping without creating a scroll container that breaks the sticky positioning.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-03 18:07:59Z)**_

根因：`.panel` 设有 `overflow: hidden`，此属性会创建新的滚动容器，致 `sticky` 失效。改为 `overflow: clip` 即可——同样裁剪圆角溢出，但不创建滚动容器。

```text
    40→

    55→    </>

    57→
    58→  const menu = (

    64→          style={item.style}

    66→        >
    67→          {item.icon && (
    68→            <span

    71→                display: 'inline-flex',
    72→                transform: 'scale(0.8)',
    73→                transformOrigin: 'left center',
    74→              }}
    75→            >

    79→          {item.label}

    82→    </DropdownMenuContent>
    83→  )
    84→
    85→  if (tooltipHandle) {
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
From the screenshot, I can see that base-ui's `Positioner` is setting `z-index: 9` via inline style. The `zIndex: 50` on the popup CSS class exists but the Positioner wraps the Popup and has a lower z-index from base-ui's defaults.

The fix is to set a higher z-index on the `MenuPrimitive.Positioner` component. Base-ui's Positioner likely accepts a style prop. I should add a style with zIndex to the Positioner.

Actually, looking more carefully - toolbar has `zIndex: 2` (set by user), and the positioner has `z-index: 9`. 

The dropdown is portaled to the body level, so the positioner's z-index of 9 should take precedence over the toolbar's z-index of 2 unless there's a stacking context issue. The toolbar's `position: sticky` with `z-index: 2` might create its own stacking context, which could complicate things depending on what other containers are involved. But the simplest solution is just to increase the z-index on the Positioner component to ensure the dropdown appears above everything else.

I'll set the Positioner's z-index to 50 to match the popup's z-index and avoid any stacking context conflicts.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-03 18:15:32Z)**_

截图中 base-ui 的 `Positioner` 内联设了 `z-index: 9`，而 popup 的 CSS `zIndex: 50` 只作用于内层。需在 `Positioner` 上也设置 z-index。

```text
     7→  Klass,

    11→} from 'lexical'

    26→
    27→const saveExcalidrawSnapshot = async (
    28→  snapshot: object,
    29→  existingRef?: string,
    30→): Promise<string> => {
    31→  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(snapshot)], {
    32→    type: 'application/json',
    33→  })
    34→  const file = new File([blob], 'snapshot.excalidraw', {
    35→    type: 'application/json',
    36→  })
    37→
    38→  // 已有文件则原地更新，否则创建新文件
    39→  if (existingRef?.startsWith('ref:file/')) {
    40→    const name = existingRef.slice(9)
    41→    const result = await filesApi.update('file', name, file)
    42→    return `ref:file/${result.name}`
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  const result = await filesApi.upload(file, 'file')
    46→  return `ref:file/${result.name}`
    47→}
    48→
    49→// React wrapper: syncs Vue-driven props and emits callbacks back
    50→const ShiroEditorReact = (props: {
    51→  editorProps: Omit<ShiroEditorProps, 'onChange' | 'onSubmit' | 'onEditorReady'>
    52→  onChange?: (value: SerializedEditorState) => void
    53→  onSubmit?: () => void
    54→  onEditorReady?: (editor: LexicalEditor | null) => void
    55→}) => {
    56→  return createElement(
    57→    DialogStackProvider,
    58→    null,
    59→    createElement(
    60→      ExcalidrawConfigProvider,
    61→      { saveSnapshot: saveExcalidrawSnapshot, apiUrl: API_URL },
    62→      createElement(ShiroEditor, {
    63→        ...props.editorProps,
    64→        header: createElement(ToolbarPlugin),
    65→        onChange: props.onChange,
    66→        onSubmit: props.onSubmit,
    67→        onEditorReady: props.onEditorReady,
    68→      }),
    69→    ),
    70→  )
    71→}
    72→
    73→export const RichEditor = defineComponent({
    74→  props: {
    75→    initialValue: Object as PropType<SerializedEditorState>,
    76→    theme: String as PropType<'dark' | 'light'>,
    77→    placeholder: String,
    78→    variant: String as PropType<RichEditorVariant>,
    79→    autoFocus: { type: Boolean, default: undefined },
    80→    className: String,
    81→    contentClassName: String,
    82→    debounceMs: Number,
    83→    selfHostnames: Array as PropType<string[]>,
    84→    extraNodes: Array as PropType<Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>>,
    85→    editorStyle: Object as PropType<Record<string, string>>,
    86→    imageUpload: Function as PropType<ImageUploadFn>,
    87→  },
    88→  emits: {
    89→    change: (_value: SerializedEditorState) => true,
    90→    textChange: (_text: string) => true,
    91→    submit: () => true,
    92→    editorReady: (_editor: LexicalEditor | null) => true,
    93→  },
    94→  setup(props, { emit, expose }) {
    95→    const containerRef = ref<HTMLDivElement>()
    96→    let root: Root | null = null
    97→    let editorInstance: LexicalEditor | null = null
    98→    let unmounting = false
    99→
   100→    const buildEditorProps = (
   101→      resolvedTheme: 'dark' | 'light',
   102→    ): Omit<ShiroEditorProps, 'onChange' | 'onSubmit' | 'onEditorReady'> => {
   103→      const editorProps: Record<string, unknown> = { theme: resolvedTheme }
   104→      if (props.initialValue !== undefined)
   105→        editorProps.initialValue = props.initialValue
   106→      if (props.placeholder !== undefined)
   107→        editorProps.placeholder = props.placeholder
   108→      if (props.variant !== undefined) editorProps.variant = props.variant
   109→      if (props.autoFocus !== undefined) editorProps.autoFocus = props.autoFocus
   110→      if (props.className !== undefined) editorProps.className = props.className
   111→      if (props.contentClassName !== undefined)
   112→        editorProps.contentClassName = props.contentClassName
   113→      if (props.debounceMs !== undefined)
   114→        editorProps.debounceMs = props.debounceMs
   115→      if (props.selfHostnames !== undefined)
   116→        editorProps.selfHostnames = props.selfHostnames
   117→      if (props.extraNodes !== undefined)
   118→        editorProps.extraNodes = props.extraNodes
   119→      if (props.editorStyle !== undefined) editorProps.style = props.editorStyle
   120→      if (props.imageUpload !== undefined)
   121→        editorProps.imageUpload = props.imageUpload
   122→      return editorProps as any
   123→    }
   124→
   125→    const renderReact = (resolvedTheme: 'dark' | 'light') => {
   126→      if (!root) return
   127→      root.render(
   128→        createElement(ShiroEditorReact, {
   129→          editorProps: buildEditorProps(resolvedTheme),
   130→          onChange: (value: SerializedEditorState) => {
   131→            if (unmounting) return
   132→            emit('change', value)
   133→            if (editorInstance) {
   134→              editorInstance.read(() => {
   135→                emit('textChange', $convertToMarkdownString(TRANSFORMERS))
   136→              })
   137→            }
   138→          },
   139→          onSubmit: () => emit('submit'),
   140→          onEditorReady: (editor: LexicalEditor | null) => {
   141→            editorInstance = editor
   142→            emit('editorReady', editor)
   143→            if (editor) {
   144→              editor.read(() => {
   145→                emit('textChange', $convertToMarkdownString(TRANSFORMERS))
   146→              })
   147→            }
   148→          },
   149→        }),
   150→      )
   151→    }
   152→
   153→    onMounted(() => {
   154→      root = createRoot(containerRef.value!)
   155→
   156→      const uiStore = useUIStore()
   157→      const resolveTheme = () =>
   158→        props.theme ?? (uiStore.isDark ? 'dark' : 'light')
   159→
   160→      renderReact(resolveTheme())
   161→
   162→      watch(
   163→        () => [
   164→          props.theme,
   165→          uiStore.isDark,
   166→          props.initialValue,
   167→          props.placeholder,
   168→          props.variant,
   169→          props.autoFocus,
   170→          props.className,
   171→          props.contentClassName,
   172→          props.debounceMs,
   173→          props.selfHostnames,
   174→          props.extraNodes,
   175→          props.editorStyle,
   176→          props.imageUpload,
   177→        ],
   178→        () => renderReact(resolveTheme()),
   179→      )
   180→    })
   181→
   182→    onBeforeUnmount(() => {
   183→      unmounting = true
   184→      root?.unmount()
   185→      root = null
   186→      editorInstance = null
   187→    })
   188→
   189→    expose({
   190→      focus: () => editorInstance?.focus(),
   191→    })
   192→
   193→    return () => <div class="h-full w-full" ref={containerRef} />
   194→  },
   195→})
   196→
```

```text
   103→        title: '链接',
   104→        shortcut: 'Ctrl+K',

   131→        action: () => executeCommand(commands.quote),

   156→        shortcut: 'Ctrl+Z',
   157→        action: () => {
   158→          if (props.editorView) {
   159→            props.editorView.focus()
   160→            undo(props.editorView)
   161→            selectionVersion.value += 1
   162→          }
   163→        },
   164→      },
   165→      {
   166→        icon: Redo2,
   167→        title: '重做',
   168→        shortcut: 'Ctrl+Y',
   169→        action: () => {

   173→            selectionVersion.value += 1

   178→
   179→    const updateSelectionState = () => {
   180→      selectionVersion.value += 1
   181→    }
   182→
   183→    const setupSelectionListeners = (view: EditorView | undefined) => {
   184→      if (!view) return
   185→
   186→      const handleMouseUp = () => updateSelectionState()
   187→      const handleKeyUp = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   188→        if (
   189→          e.key === 'Shift' ||
   190→          e.key.startsWith('Arrow') ||
   191→          e.ctrlKey ||
   192→          e.metaKey
   193→        ) {
   194→          updateSelectionState()
   195→        }
   196→      }
   197→      const handleMouseDown = () => updateSelectionState()
   198→
   199→      view.dom.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp)
   200→      view.dom.addEventListener('keyup', handleKeyUp)
   201→      view.dom.addEventListener('mousedown', handleMouseDown)
   202→
   203→      detachSelectionListeners = () => {
   204→        view.dom.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp)
   205→        view.dom.removeEventListener('keyup', handleKeyUp)
   206→        view.dom.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleMouseDown)
   207→      }
   208→    }
   209→
   210→    watch(
   211→      () => props.editorView,
   212→      (view) => {
   213→        if (detachSelectionListeners) {
   214→          detachSelectionListeners()
   215→          detachSelectionListeners = null
   216→        }
   217→        setupSelectionListeners(view)
   218→        updateSelectionState()
   219→      },
   220→      { immediate: true },
   221→    )
   222→
   223→    onUnmounted(() => {
   224→      if (detachSelectionListeners) {
   225→        detachSelectionListeners()
   226→      }
   227→    })
   228→
   229→    const ToolbarButtonComponent = defineComponent({
   230→      props: {
   231→        button: {
   232→          type: Object as PropType<ToolbarButton>,
   233→          required: true,
   234→        },
   235→        isEmojiButton: {
   236→          type: Boolean,
   237→          default: false,
   238→        },
   239→      },
   240→      setup(buttonProps) {
   241→        return () => (
   242→          <NPopover
   243→            trigger="hover"
   244→            placement="bottom"
   245→            delay={400}
   246→            showArrow={false}
   247→          >
   248→            {{
   249→              trigger: () => (
   250→                <button
   251→                  ref={buttonProps.isEmojiButton ? emojiButtonRef : undefined}
   252→                  onClick={buttonProps.button.action}
   253→                  class={[
   254→                    'toolbar-button inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-center border-none bg-transparent outline-none',
   255→                    selectionVersion.value && props.editorView
   256→                      ? buttonProps.button.isActive?.(props.editorView)
   257→                        ? 'is-active'
   258→                        : ''
   259→                      : '',
   260→                  ]}
   261→                  aria-label={buttonProps.button.title}
   262→                >
   263→                  {/* @ts-ignore */}
   264→                  <buttonProps.button.icon size={15} />
   265→                </button>
   266→              ),
   267→              default: () => (
   268→                <div class="px-2 py-1.5">
   269→                  <div class="whitespace-nowrap text-xs">
   270→                    {buttonProps.button.title}
   271→                    <span class="ml-2 opacity-50">
   272→                      {buttonProps.button.shortcut}
   273→                    </span>
   274→                  </div>
   275→                </div>
   276→              ),
   277→            }}
   278→          </NPopover>
   279→        )
   280→      },
   281→    })
   282→
   283→    return () => (
   284→      <div class="markdown-toolbar flex items-center gap-2 py-2 pl-2 pr-4">
   285→        {buttons.flatMap((button, index) => {
   286→          const elements = [
   287→            <ToolbarButtonComponent
   288→              key={`btn-${index}`}
   289→              button={button}
   290→              isEmojiButton={index === 0}
   291→            />,
   292→          ]
   293→
   294→          if (button.divider) {
   295→            elements.push(
   296→              <span
   297→                key={`div-${index}`}
   298→                class="inline-block h-4 w-px bg-neutral-300 opacity-50 dark:bg-neutral-600"
   299→              />,
   300→            )
   301→          }
   302→
   303→          return elements
   304→        })}
   305→
   306→        <NPopover
   307→          show={emojiPickerVisible.value}
   308→          onUpdateShow={(val) => (emojiPickerVisible.value = val)}
   309→          trigger="manual"
   310→          placement="bottom-start"
   311→          x-placement="bottom-start"
   312→          to={emojiButtonRef.value}
   313→          style={{ padding: 0 }}
   314→          onClickoutside={() => (emojiPickerVisible.value = false)}
   315→        >
   316→          {{
```

```text
    60→      type: Boolean,
    61→      default: false,
    62→    },
    63→    onArrowDownFromTitle: {
    64→      type: Function as PropType<() => void>,
    65→    },
    66→    onAutoFocusContent: {
    67→      type: Function as PropType<() => void>,
    68→    },
    69→  },
    70→  setup(props, { slots }) {
    71→    const scrollContainerRef = ref<HTMLElement>()
    72→    const { general, destory } = useEditorConfig()
    73→    const titleInputRef = ref<{ focus: () => void }>()
    74→
    75→    onUnmounted(() => {
    76→      destory()
    77→    })
    78→
    79→    const isRichMode = computed(() => props.contentFormat === 'lexical')
    80→
    81→    const handleAutoFocus = () => {
    82→      if (!props.autoFocus) return
    83→      nextTick(() => {
    84→        if (props.autoFocus === 'title') {
    85→          titleInputRef.value?.focus()
    86→        } else if (props.autoFocus === 'content') {
    87→          props.onAutoFocusContent?.()
    88→        }
    89→      })
    90→    }
    91→
    92→    watch(
    93→      () => props.loading,
    94→      (loading, prevLoading) => {
    95→        if (prevLoading && !loading) {
    96→          handleAutoFocus()
    97→        }
    98→      },
    99→    )
   100→
   101→    onMounted(() => {
   102→      if (!props.loading) {
   103→        handleAutoFocus()
   104→      }
   105→    })
   106→
   107→    const subtitleContent = computed(() => {
   108→      if (typeof props.subtitleSlot === 'function') {
   109→        return props.subtitleSlot()
   110→      }
   111→      return props.subtitleSlot || slots.subtitle?.()
   112→    })
   113→
   114→    const isMarkdownWysiwygMode = computed(
   115→      () => general.setting.renderMode === 'wysiwyg',
   116→    )
   117→
   118→    const canSwitchEditorType = computed(
   119→      () => !props.hasContent && !!props.onContentFormatChange,
   120→    )
   121→    const canSwitchMarkdownRenderMode = computed(
   122→      () => props.hasContent && !isRichMode.value,
   123→    )
   124→
   125→    const handleToggleEditorType = () => {
   126→      if (!props.onContentFormatChange) return
   127→      props.onContentFormatChange(isRichMode.value ? 'markdown' : 'lexical')
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    const handleToggleMarkdownRenderMode = () => {
   131→      general.setting.renderMode = isMarkdownWysiwygMode.value
   132→        ? 'plain'
   133→        : 'wysiwyg'
   134→    }
   135→
   136→    return () => {
   137→      const { setting: generalSetting } = general
   138→      return (
   139→        <NElement
   140→          tag="div"
   141→          style={
   142→            {
   143→              '--editor-font-size': generalSetting.fontSize
   144→                ? `${generalSetting.fontSize / 14}rem`
   145→                : '',
   146→              '--editor-font-family': generalSetting.fontFamily,
   147→            } as any
   148→          }
   149→          class={[
   150→            'write-editor-wrapper min-h-[100dvh]',
   151→            isRichMode.value && 'rich-editor-mode',
   152→          ]}
   153→        >
   154→          <div ref={scrollContainerRef} class="write-editor-scroll-container">
   155→            <div class="write-editor-header">
   156→              <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
   157→                <GhostInput
   158→                  ref={titleInputRef}
   159→                  value={props.title}
   160→                  onChange={props.onTitleChange}
   161→                  placeholder={props.titlePlaceholder}
   162→                  onArrowDown={() => props.onArrowDownFromTitle?.()}
   163→                  class="flex-1"
   164→                />
   165→
   166→                {canSwitchEditorType.value && (
   167→                  <NTooltip>
   168→                    {{
   169→                      trigger: () => (
   170→                        <button
   171→                          class="flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer rounded-md border border-neutral-300 p-1.5 text-neutral-600 transition-colors hover:border-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-800 dark:border-neutral-600 dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:border-neutral-500 dark:hover:text-neutral-200"
   172→                          onClick={handleToggleEditorType}
   173→                          aria-label={
   174→                            isRichMode.value
   175→                              ? '切换到 Markdown 编辑器'
   176→                              : '切换到 Rich 编辑器'
   177→                          }
   178→                        >
   179→                          {isRichMode.value ? (
   180→                            <FileCode2 class="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   181→                          ) : (
   182→                            <Pencil class="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   183→                          )}
   184→                        </button>
   185→                      ),
   186→                      default: () =>
   187→                        isRichMode.value
   188→                          ? '切换到 Markdown 编辑器'
   189→                          : '切换到 Rich 编辑器',
   190→                    }}
   191→                  </NTooltip>
   192→                )}
   193→
   194→                {canSwitchMarkdownRenderMode.value && (
   195→                  <NTooltip>
   196→                    {{
   197→                      trigger: () => (
   198→                        <button
   199→                          class="flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer rounded-md border border-neutral-300 p-1.5 text-neutral-600 transition-colors hover:border-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-800 dark:border-neutral-600 dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:border-neutral-500 dark:hover:text-neutral-200"
   200→                          onClick={handleToggleMarkdownRenderMode}
   201→                          aria-label={
   202→                            isMarkdownWysiwygMode.value
   203→                              ? '切换至源代码模式'
   204→                              : '切换至所见即所得模式'
   205→                          }
   206→                        >
   207→                          {isMarkdownWysiwygMode.value ? (
   208→                            <FileCode2 class="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   209→                          ) : (
   210→                            <Pencil class="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   211→                          )}
   212→                        </button>
   213→                      ),
   214→                      default: () =>
   215→                        isMarkdownWysiwygMode.value
   216→                          ? '切换至源代码模式'
   217→                          : '切换至所见即所得模式',
   218→                    }}
   219→                  </NTooltip>
   220→                )}
   221→              </div>
   222→
   223→              {subtitleContent.value && (
   224→                <div class="write-editor-subtitle">{subtitleContent.value}</div>
   225→              )}
   226→            </div>
   227→
   228→            <div
   229→              class="write-editor-content"
   230→              onClick={() => {
   231→                props.onAutoFocusContent?.()
   232→              }}
   233→            >
   234→              {slots.default?.()}
   235→            </div>
   236→          </div>
   237→        </NElement>
   238→      )
   239→    }
   240→  },
   241→})
   242→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-04 06:06:52Z)**_

问题在于 `.write-editor-content` 的 `flex: 1; min-height: 0` 限制了高度，导致 scroll-container 实际不会滚动。rich-editor 模式下内容应自然撑高才能触发外层滚动。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-04 06:06:58Z)**_

基础样式里 `.write-editor-content` 和 `> div` 都用 `flex: 1; min-height: 0` 将高度锁死在视口内，内容溢出被内部吸收而非触发 scroll-container 滚动。rich-editor 模式下需让内容自然撑高。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-04 06:07:06Z)**_

变更：
- `.rich-editor-mode .write-editor-content`：`flex: 0 0 auto`，不再被 flex 压缩，高度由内容撑开
- `.rich-editor-mode .write-editor-content > div`：`height: auto`，覆盖基础的 `flex: 1; min-height: 0`，让 Vue 容器也自然撑高

这样编辑器内容增长时 `.write-editor-scroll-container`（`overflow-y: auto`）会真正滚动，toolbar 的 sticky 即可生效。
